citation.sourceDocument: Louisiana Department of Revenue, RIB 25-012: a flat 3% individual income tax for tax years on or after 2025 (Act 11, 2024 Third Extraordinary Session), replacing the graduated 1.85%/3.5%/4.25% brackets and the federal-tax deduction. Standard deduction $12,500 single/MFS, $25,000 MFJ/qualifying surviving spouse/head of household (the $25,000 covers HoH, unlike the federal split). The standard deduction is inflation-indexed beginning 2026; the 2025-enacted base is used pending the published 2026 amount, so the figure errs slightly high — the conservative side. Per-dependent deductions are deferred (the engine's no-dependent assumption, shared by every modeled state).
